历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 12365 → 12953 → 11528 → 12430 → 16174, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 16174, a drop of about 3700 positions from 2024, the largest decline in the past five years. The provincial science enrollment plan was 55 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 59 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 61, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it is approximately 70th, with a stable ranking in the 65-70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the College of Liberal Arts, which the university has initiated an investigation into, having a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (average evaluation), with short video exposure at a medium-low level. Geology A, Archaeology A, Software Engineering A-, among which Software Engineering is directly related to computer enrollment majors, attracting some science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in society, highly matching the Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Software Engineering majors offered by Northwest University. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (285,688), sharply intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 211 university, which is a cross-province application for Yunnan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2%-3%, at a medium-low level, with no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the notable increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the negative reputation, competition is expected to continue intensifying in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16553, with a range of 16053-17053.
